title: Pufferfishes and more
description: Adds fish related items and bosses with unique abilities and designs that turn minecraft into a rpg
body:
[![image.png](https://i.postimg.cc/FHYqTkDy/image.png)](https://postimg.cc/4YTBdyCy)

#  Pufferfishes and more is a small adventure like mod that is currently adding 4 new bosses, new mobs and a lot of normal AND cursed new items.
[![image.png](https://i.postimg.cc/j2zNxcxH/image.png)](https://postimg.cc/30xW9gDN)

##  Content:
So far there are 7 mobs (one coming very soon), 13 items out of which every has some uses and 5 weapons, obtained by defeating bosses and crafting.

[![image.png](https://i.postimg.cc/bJ0NdBnw/image.png)](https://postimg.cc/zbB1cpps)

##  Extra additions:
There's also a new structure where you can find one of 4 boss summoning items and a new villager proffesion called the fish master.

## Some videos showing the mod

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LnHVz9mTX-s

https://youtu.be/g0PVqCbpbWk

###  The mod is still WIP so expect often updates (at least once per month) as well as bug fixes and other content changes.
[![image.png](https://i.postimg.cc/g26wm4gn/image.png)](https://postimg.cc/fVDWv7nN)

###  Goodluck surviving!
